title: Yellow Dust
writer: Cyril Hume, John Twist, Dan Totheroh
actors: Richard Dix, Leila Hyams, Moroni Olsen
plot: Eastern educated Bob Culpepper, along with grizzled prospector Solitary, hit the mother lode and head to Gold Town to stake their claim. Along the way they chase off a gang of stagecoach robbers, led by the oafish Missouri, who wo...
